nasb.text: They cut off his head and stripped off his weapons, and sent them throughout the land of the Philistines, to carry the good news to the house of their idols and to the people.

esv.text: So they cut off his head and stripped off his armor and sent messengers throughout the land of the Philistines, to carry the good news to the house of their idols and to the people.

cnv.text: 就砍下他的頭，解下他的兵器，又派人到非利士地的各處，去向他們的偶像的廟和人民報信。

ccb.text: 就割下了扫罗的头颅，剥下他的盔甲，并派人走遍非利士全境，在他们偶像的庙里及民众中通告消息。
